login.title: Login to an account
login.inviteContext: You are logging in to accept an invite to join a space:

forgotPassword.title: Password Reset Sent
forgotPassword.message: If an account with the provided username or email exists, a password reset link has been sent to it.
forgotPassword.messageShort: If an account exists for that username or email, a password reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.usernameRequired: Please enter your username or email to reset your password

dob.ageHint: You must be at least 13 years old. Latest birth year: {{maxYear}}.

invite.invalidDescription: This invite may be expired, or you might not have permission to join it.
invite.deepLinkFailed: It looks like the Mutualzz app did not respond. You can accept the invite here in your browser.

appeal.title: Submit an Appeal
appeal.description: Explain why you believe this decision should be reconsidered. A staff member will review your appeal. Space lockdown appeals can only be submitted by the space owner using the email link.
appeal.descriptionShort: Explain why you believe this decision should be reconsidered. A staff member will review your appeal.
appeal.placeholder: Tell us why this decision should be reconsidered
appeal.success: Your appeal has been submitted. Our staff team will review it and follow up by email.

joinSpace.title: Join a space
joinSpace.description: Enter an invite below to join an existing space
joinSpace.preferCreate: You prefer to create your own space?
